title: From Synthesis to Clinical Assistance: A Strategy-Aware Agent Framework for Autism Intervention based on Real Clinical Dataset
note: Strategy-aware ASD intervention framework with DoctorAgent and ChildAgent for ABA-aligned dialogue synthesis and clinical decision support.

title: SocialWise: LLM-Agentic Conversation Therapy for Individuals with Autism
note: Conversation-therapy chatbot for autistic users with role-play, knowledge retrieval, and feedback agents.

title: NeuroWise: A Multi-Agent LLM Glass-Box System for Practicing Double-Empathy Communication with Autistic Partners
note: Multi-agent LLM system for practicing autism-aware communication grounded in the double-empathy framework.

title: Exploring Implicit Perspectives on Autism in Large Language Models Through Multi-Agent Simulations
note: Uses multi-agent simulations to study implicit autism-related bias and assumptions in LLM behavior.

title: Affordances and Risks of ChatGPT to Autistic Users
note: Examines utility and risk patterns of ChatGPT for autistic users from real-world use narratives.

title: When Machines Get It Wrong: Large Language Models Perpetuate Autism Myths More Than Humans Do
note: Benchmarks autism-myth endorsement and shows LLMs underperform humans on autism knowledge fidelity.

title: Accuracy of Autism-Related TikTok Information in Italian: A Comparison Between Human Raters and Large Language Models
note: Compares human and LLM assessment quality for autism-related short-video information.

title: Multimodal Data Integration for Early Autism Detection and LLM-Assisted Intervention Planning
note: Discusses multimodal early ASD detection and the role of LLMs in intervention planning.

title: A PATE-to-MedPrompt System for Autism Detection
note: LLM-based autism detection pipeline using symptom narratives and medical prompting.

title: GPT-Powered Chatbot-Based Positive Psychology Intervention for Parents of Autistic Children
note: Explores a culturally adapted chatbot intervention for parents of autistic children.

title: Autism Detection Based on Computational Analysis of Parental Speech
note: Computational analysis pipeline for ASD detection from parents' speech patterns.
